data.name: Label_FeesDescription
data.value: Here's a breakdown of the deliverables by category.

data.name: Terms_Intro
data.value: This document serves as a Non-Binding Indicative Quote, providing a professional roadmap for your project. While these figures are estimates based on your inputs, they establish the expert-level framework for your home transformation.

data.name: Terms_Point1
data.value: A €0.00 price indicates a highly specialized task requiring an on-site professional assessment. This ensures that every unique detail of your project is accurately captured in the final binding offer.

data.name: Terms_Point2
data.value: Transparency is key: these figures represent the skilled labor required for your project. Materials are not included at this stage, providing you with full flexibility to select finishes that match your specific style and budget.

data.name: Terms_Point3
data.value: To proceed, contact Customer Support to transition this indicative quote into a competitive auction. Our elite network of tradesmen will then provide firm, binding bids based on this verified scope.

data.name: Terms_Point4
data.value: Your investment is secure. BuildSmart guarantees that no payments are released to a tradesperson until you have digitally verified and approved the completed milestones.

data.name: Terms_Point5
data.value: We provide a labor re-performance limit guarantee. If workmanship does not meet our professional standards, we will rectify the issue at no additional cost to you, protecting your investment from start to finish.

data.name: Footer_Validity
data.value: This document is a non-binding indicative quote and does not constitute a legal contract. Final pricing is subject to a site visit and the results of the competitive auction process.
